command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '商品'
ws['B1'] = '库存(件)'
ws['C1'] = '安全库存(件)'
ws['A2'] = 'A型手机壳'
ws['B2'] = 45
ws['C2'] = 50
ws['A3'] = 'B型充电宝'
ws['B3'] = 120
ws['C3'] = 30
ws['A4'] = 'C型数据线'
ws['B4'] = 18
ws['C4'] = 40
ws['A5'] = 'D型耳机'
ws['B5'] = 200
ws['C5'] = 60
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/inventory.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 从/home/user/Desktop/inventory.xlsx中找到库存低于安全库存的商品，在/home/user/Desktop/stock_alert.txt末尾追加：'库存预警：A型手机壳、C型数据线'，保存

include: 库存预警：A型手机壳、C型数据线
